groups: Group 17: Financial Account and Financial Balance Sheet

items.desc: HH final consumption expenditure: durable goods (CVM)
HH final consumption expenditure: durable goods (CP)

items.eq: DINV  = (GDPM  + M  - SDE)  - CGG  - CONS  - VAL  - IF  - X
items.py: (v['GDPM']  + v['M']  - v['SDE'])  - v['CGG']  - v['CONS']  - v['VAL']  - v['IF']  - v['X']

items.desc: Change in inventories of HH and NPISH
Change in inventories of Central Govt.
items.eq: DINVCG  = PSNI  - CGIPS  - LAIPS  - IPCPS  - IBPC  - (NPACG  + NPALA)  - (KCGPSO  - KPSCG)  - (KLA  - KGLAPC  - KGLA)  - (KPCPS  - KPSPC)  - ASSETSA  + DEP  + ASSETSA
items.py: v['PSNI']  - v['CGIPS']  - v['LAIPS']  - v['IPCPS']  - v['IBPC']  - (v['NPACG']  + v['NPALA'])  - (v['KCGPSO']  - v['KPSCG'])  - (v['KLA']  - v['KGLAPC']  - v['KGLA'])  - (v['KPCPS']  - v['KPSPC'])  - v['ASSETSA']  + v['DEP']  + v['ASSETSA']

items.desc: Alignemnt adjustment applied to change in inventories
Rate of annual writing down allowance for industrial buildings
Rate of initial-year allowances for industrial buildings
Rate of annual writing down allowance for plant
Rate of first-year allowances for plant
Rate of annual writing down allowance for vehicles
Present value of depreciation allowances for buildings
Present value of depreciation allowances for plant
Present value of depreciation allowances for vehicles

items.eq: TAF  = WB  * TAFB  + WP  * TAFP  + WV  * TAFV
items.py: v['WB']  * v['TAFB']  + v['WP']  * v['TAFP']  + v['WV']  * v['TAFV']

items.desc: Real weighted average cost of finance
Gap between capital stock and optimal level of capital
Price of market sector capital exclusing housing

items.eq: IBUS  = IF  - GGI  - PCIH  - PCLEB  - IH  - IPRL
items.py: v['IF']  - v['GGI']  - v['PCIH']  - v['PCLEB']  - v['IH']  - v['IPRL']

items.desc: Business investment ex. BNFL transfer to CG
General Government GFCF inc. BNFL transfer to CG
PC investment in existing buildings & transfer costs
Private sector transfer costs on non-produced non-fin. assets
HH net acquisitions of non-produced non-fin. assets
Private sector investment in dwellings deflator
Private sector transfer costs on non-produced non-fin. assets deflator
Net additions to the total housing stock
Private sector transfer costs on non-produced non-fin. Assets (CP)
Gross fixed capital formation by HH&NPISH

items.eq: PIBUS  = 100  * (IFPS  - IHPS  - IPRLPS  - (PIF  * 0.9828  / 100)  * (PCIH  + PCLEB)  - GGIPS)  / IBUS

items.desc: Gross fixed capital formation by PNFCs
GFCF & net acquisition of land: PCs
Gross fixed capital formation by FINCOs
items.eq: IFCPS  = IFPS  - IHHPS  - ICCPS  - LAIPS  - CGIPS  - IPCPS
items.py: v['IFPS']  - v['IHHPS']  - v['ICCPS']  - v['LAIPS']  - v['CGIPS']  - v['IPCPS']

items.desc: Gross capital stock per hour worked

items.eq: dlog(EPS)  = log((ET  - ECG  - ELA)  / (ET(-1)  - ECG(-1)  - ELA(-1)))

items.desc: ONS population projection: state pension age
Net migration (fiscal year adds up to ONS mid-year observations)

items.eq: LFSUR  = 100  * ULFS  / (ETLFS  + ULFS)@IDENTITY PRODH  = GDPM  / HWA

items.desc: Consumer prices in the US, Canada, Japan and the euro area
GDP in the US, Canada, Japan and the euro area
UK export markets for goods & services
EU trade with the rest of the world
Trend specialisation in world trade & ind. production
Household consumption weighted by its import content
Government consumption weighted by its import content
GFCF weighted by its import content
Inventories (excl. alignment adjustment) weighted by its import content
Services exports weighted by its import content
Goods exports weighted by its import content

items.eq: MTFE  = MC  + MCGG  + MIF  + MDINV  + MXS  + MXG
items.py: v['MC']  + v['MCGG']  + v['MIF']  + v['MDINV']  + v['MXS']  + v['MXG']

items.desc: index of final demand weighted by import intensity (goods)

items.eq: PMGREL  = PMNOG  / (0.156  * PCE+0.097  * GGFCD  + 0.203  * PIF  + 0.096  * PINV  + 0.352  * PXNOG  + 0.063  * PXS)

items.desc: index of final demand weighted by import intensity (services)

items.eq: PMSREL  = PMS  / (0.060  * PCE+0.040  * GGFCD  + 0.067  * PIF  + 0.040  * PINV  + 0.024  * PXNOG  + 0.098  * PXS)

items.desc: Â£ price of brent (PBRENT/RXD) in base year (2009)
Private sector average earnings index (inc. bonus)
items.eq: dlog(PSAVEI)  =  - 0.0282  + 0.575  * dlog(PMSGVA)  + 0.250  * dlog(PMSGVA(-1))  + 0.105  * dlog(PMSGVA(-2))  + (1  - 0.575  - 0.250  - 0.105)  * dlog(PMSGVA(-3))  - 0.0096  * (LFSUR  - LFSUR(-1))  + 0.264  * (dlog(MSGVA)  - dlog(EMS))  + 0.282  * (dlog(CPI)  - dlog(PMSGVA))  - 0.04328  * (log(PSAVEI(-1))  - log(MSGVA(-1)  / EMS(-1))  - log(PMSGVA(-1))  + log(1  + (EMPSC(-1)  / WFP(-1)))  + 0.0137  * LFSUR(-1))
items.py: - 0.0282  + 0.575  * (np.log(v['PMSGVA']) - np.log(_lag('PMSGVA', 1)))  + 0.250  * (np.log(_lag('PMSGVA', 1)) - np.log(_lag('PMSGVA', 2)))  + 0.105  * (np.log(_lag('PMSGVA', 2)) - np.log(_lag('PMSGVA', 3)))  + (1  - 0.575  - 0.250  - 0.105)  * (np.log(_lag('PMSGVA', 3)) - np.log(_lag('PMSGVA', 4)))  - 0.0096  * (v['LFSUR']  - _lag('LFSUR', 1))  + 0.264  * ((np.log(v['MSGVA']) - np.log(_lag('MSGVA', 1)))  - (np.log(v['EMS']) - np.log(_lag('EMS', 1))))  + 0.282  * ((np.log(v['CPI']) - np.log(_lag('CPI', 1)))  - (np.log(v['PMSGVA']) - np.log(_lag('PMSGVA', 1))))  - 0.04328  * (np.log(_lag('PSAVEI', 1))  - np.log(_lag('MSGVA', 1)  / _lag('EMS', 1))  - np.log(_lag('PMSGVA', 1))  + np.log(1  + (_lag('EMPSC', 1)  / _lag('WFP', 1)))  + 0.0137  * _lag('LFSUR', 1))

items.desc: Time varying coefficient for wages & salaries
Mkt Sector GVA ex self-employed sector

items.eq: MCOST  = 36.83  * (ULCMS  / ULCMSBASE)  + 24.64  * (PMNOG  / PMNOGBASE)  + 4.04  * (PMS  / PMSBASE)  + 4.85  * ((PBRENT  / RXD)  / OILBASE)  + 1.01  * ((BPAPS  / GVA)  / TXRATEBASE)  + 24.72  * (SCOST  / 100)  + 0.47  * (CCOST  / 100)  + 3.43  * (UTCOST  / 100)
items.py: 36.83  * (v['ULCMS']  / v['ULCMSBASE'])  + 24.64  * (v['PMNOG']  / v['PMNOGBASE'])  + 4.04  * (v['PMS']  / v['PMSBASE'])  + 4.85  * ((v['PBRENT']  / v['RXD'])  / v['OILBASE'])  + 1.01  * ((v['BPAPS']  / v['GVA'])  / v['TXRATEBASE'])  + 24.72  * (v['SCOST']  / 100)  + 0.47  * (v['CCOST']  / 100)  + 3.43  * (v['UTCOST']  / 100)

items.desc: Index of costs: Mkt Sector services output
items.eq: SCOST  = 70.54  * (ULCMS  / ULCMSBASE)  + 6.93  * (PMNOG  / PMNOGBASE)  + 6.41  * (PMS  / PMSBASE)  + 0.09  * ((PBRENT  / RXD)  / OILBASE)  + 3.52  * ((BPAPS  / GVA)  / TXRATEBASE)  + 9.78  * (PPIY  / PPIYBASE)  + 1.64  * (CCOST  / 100)  + 1.09  * (UTCOST  / 100)
items.py: 70.54  * (v['ULCMS']  / v['ULCMSBASE'])  + 6.93  * (v['PMNOG']  / v['PMNOGBASE'])  + 6.41  * (v['PMS']  / v['PMSBASE'])  + 0.09  * ((v['PBRENT']  / v['RXD'])  / v['OILBASE'])  + 3.52  * ((v['BPAPS']  / v['GVA'])  / v['TXRATEBASE'])  + 9.78  * (v['PPIY']  / v['PPIYBASE'])  + 1.64  * (v['CCOST']  / 100)  + 1.09  * (v['UTCOST']  / 100)

items.eq: CCOST  = 40.25  * (ULCMS  / ULCMSBASE)  + 2.80  * (PMNOG  / PMNOGBASE)  + 0.90  * (PMS  / PMSBASE)  + 0.03  * ((PBRENT  / RXD)  / OILBASE)  + 0.51  * ((BPAPS  / GVA)  / TXRATEBASE)  + 27.06  * (PPIY  / PPIYBASE)  + 28.13  * (SCOST  / 100)  + 0.34  * (UTCOST  / 100)
items.py: 40.25  * (v['ULCMS']  / v['ULCMSBASE'])  + 2.80  * (v['PMNOG']  / v['PMNOGBASE'])  + 0.90  * (v['PMS']  / v['PMSBASE'])  + 0.03  * ((v['PBRENT']  / v['RXD'])  / v['OILBASE'])  + 0.51  * ((v['BPAPS']  / v['GVA'])  / v['TXRATEBASE'])  + 27.06  * (v['PPIY']  / v['PPIYBASE'])  + 28.13  * (v['SCOST']  / 100)  + 0.34  * (v['UTCOST']  / 100)

items.eq: UTCOST  = 14.85  * (ULCMS  / ULCMSBASE)  + 3.04  * (PMNOG  / PMNOGBASE)  + 0.51  * (PMS  / PMSBASE)  + 51.52  * ((PBRENT  / RXD)  / OILBASE)  + 2.90  * ((BPAPS  / GVA)  / TXRATEBASE)  + 8.24  * (PPIY  / PPIYBASE)  + 16.00  * (SCOST  / 100)  + 2.95  * (CCOST  / 100)
items.py: 14.85  * (v['ULCMS']  / v['ULCMSBASE'])  + 3.04  * (v['PMNOG']  / v['PMNOGBASE'])  + 0.51  * (v['PMS']  / v['PMSBASE'])  + 51.52  * ((v['PBRENT']  / v['RXD'])  / v['OILBASE'])  + 2.90  * ((v['BPAPS']  / v['GVA'])  / v['TXRATEBASE'])  + 8.24  * (v['PPIY']  / v['PPIYBASE'])  + 16.00  * (v['SCOST']  / 100)  + 2.95  * (v['CCOST']  / 100)

items.eq: RPCOST  = 13.18  * (PMNOG  / PMNOGBASE)  + 4.07  * (PMS  / PMSBASE)  + 11.56  * ((BPAPS  / GVA)  / TXRATEBASE)  + 7.07  * (PPIY  / PPIYBASE)  + 59.96  * (SCOST  / 100)  + 0.92  * (CCOST  / 100)  + 3.24  * (UTCOST  / 100)

ICOST  = 18.40  * (PMNOG  / PMNOGBASE)  + 0.41  * (PMS  / PMSBASE)  + 0.19  * ((PBRENT  / RXD)  / OILBASE)  + 5.63  * ((BPAPS  / MSGVA)  / TXRATEBASE)  + 8.18  * (PPIY  / PPIYBASE)  + 20.76  * (SCOST  / 100)  + 46.42  * (CCOST  / 100)
items.py: 18.40  * (v['PMNOG']  / v['PMNOGBASE'])  + 0.41  * (v['PMS']  / v['PMSBASE'])  + 0.19  * ((v['PBRENT']  / v['RXD'])  / v['OILBASE'])  + 5.63  * ((v['BPAPS']  / v['MSGVA'])  / v['TXRATEBASE'])  + 8.18  * (v['PPIY']  / v['PPIYBASE'])  + 20.76  * (v['SCOST']  / 100)  + 46.42  * (v['CCOST']  / 100)

items.eq: dlog(MKR)  = (dlog(CPI)  - W1  * dlog(CPIRENT)  - (1  - W1)  * dlog(RPCOST))  / (1  - W1)
items.py: ((np.log(v['CPI']) - np.log(_lag('CPI', 1)))  - v['W1']  * (np.log(v['CPIRENT']) - np.log(_lag('CPIRENT', 1)))  - (1  - v['W1'])  * (np.log(v['RPCOST']) - np.log(_lag('RPCOST', 1))))  / (1  - v['W1'])

items.desc: Producer output Price Index ex. taxes
LA gross rent per house per week

items.eq: PRENT  = PRENT(-1)  * (0.62  * ((WFP  / (ETLFS  - ESLFS))  / ((WFP(-1)  / (ETLFS(-1)  - ESLFS(-1)))))  + (0.15  * (HRRPW  / HRRPW(-1)))  + (0.23  * (PRP  / PRP(-1))))

items.desc: Private Registered Provider rents per house per week
January base year indices for RPI components MIPS
January base year indices for consumer prices RPI
January base year indices for consumer prices RPIX
December base year indices for consumer prices CPI
December base year indices for consumer prices CPIH
December base year indices for consumer prices OOH

Owner occupied housing (imputed rents for CPIH)

items.eq: CPIRENT  = CPIRENT(-1)  * (0.62  * ((WFP  / (ETLFS  - ESLFS))  / (WFP(-1)  / (ETLFS(-1)  - ESLFS(-1))))  + (0.15  * (HRRPW  / HRRPW(-1)))  + (0.23  * (PRP  / PRP(-1))))
PRMIP  = PRMIP(-1)  * (RMORT  / RMORT(-1))  * (LHP  / LHP(-1))  / (HH  / HH(-1))@ADD(V) PRMIP  PRMIP_A

items.desc: Housing: Mortgage Interest Payments RPI (Eviews add factor)

items.eq: PR  = I7  * ((1  - W4)  * PRXMIP  / I9  + W4  * PRMIP  / I4)

items.desc: AVI of exports of non-oil goods
AVI of imports of non-oil goods

items.eq: PIF  = (GDPMPS  - CGGPS  - CONSPS  - DINVPS  - VALPS  - XPS  + MPS  - SDEPS)  * 100  / IF
items.py: (v['GDPMPS']  - v['CGGPS']  - v['CONSPS']  - v['DINVPS']  - v['VALPS']  - v['XPS']  + v['MPS']  - v['SDEPS'])  * 100  / v['IF']

items.eq: RHF  = RMORT  - (1  - 0.25  * TPBRZ)  * (RMORT  - RDEP)  * (1  - 0.001  * LHP  / GPW)

items.desc: GVA in North Sea oil & gas extraction

items.eq: dlog(TDOIL)  =  - 0.2444325  * dlog(TDOIL(-1))  + 1.896486  * dlog(NNSGVA(-1))  - 0.1077816  * (log(PBRENT  / (RXD  * (GDPMPS(-1)  - BPAPS(-1)  - (NSGVA(-1)  * PBRENT(-1)  / (OILBASE  * RXD(-1))))  / NNSGVA(-1) ) )  - log(PBRENT(-1)  / (RXD(-1)  * (GDPMPS(-2)  - BPAPS(-2)  - (NSGVA(-2)  * PBRENT(-2)  / (OILBASE  * RXD(-2))))  / NNSGVA(-2) ) ) )  + 0.0780697  * (@recode(@date >= @dateval("1984:01")  , 1  , 0)  * @recode(@date <= @dateval("1985:01")  , 1  , 0))  - 0.0143727  - 0.2216107  * (@recode(@date  = @dateval("1986:01")  , 1  , 0)  - @recode(@date  = @dateval("1986:02")  , 1  , 0))  - 0.2457494  * (@recode(@date  = @dateval("2001:03")  , 1  , 0)  - @recode(@date  = @dateval("2001:04")  , 1  , 0))  + 0.1907036  * (@recode(@date  = @dateval("2010:03")  , 1  , 0)  - @recode(@date  = @dateval("2010:04")  , 1  , 0))  - 0.4334139  * @recode(@date  = @dateval("2013:01")  , 1  , 0)

items.desc: Price index for exports of oil
Price index for imports of oil
Brent crude oil price ($ per barrel)

items.eq: CGWS  = CGWADJ  * ERCG  * ECG  * (52  / 4000)  * (1  + (1.249  * EMPSC  / WFP))
LAWS  = LAWADJ  * ERLA  * ELA  * (52  / 4000)  * (1  + (1.418  * EMPSC  / WFP))

items.desc: Time varying coefficient for central government wages & salaries
Time varying coefficient for LA wages & salaries

items.eq: CGSUBP  = PSCE  - (CGWS  + CGP  + RCGIM  + LAWS  + LAPR  + RLAIM)  - LATSUB  - (CGSB  + LASBHH)  - CGNCGA  - ECNET  - LANCGA  - (CGOTR  + LAOTRHH)  - (DICGOP  + DILAPR  + DIPCOP)  - EUVAT  - GNP4  - CGSUBPR
items.py: v['PSCE']  - (v['CGWS']  + v['CGP']  + v['RCGIM']  + v['LAWS']  + v['LAPR']  + v['RLAIM'])  - v['LATSUB']  - (v['CGSB']  + v['LASBHH'])  - v['CGNCGA']  - v['ECNET']  - v['LANCGA']  - (v['CGOTR']  + v['LAOTRHH'])  - (v['DICGOP']  + v['DILAPR']  + v['DIPCOP'])  - v['EUVAT']  - v['GNP4']  - v['CGSUBPR']

items.eq: LASUBPR  = (LASUBPR(-4)  + LASUBPR(-3)  + LASUBPR(-2)  + LASUBPR(-1))  * 0.25  * (PGDP  * 4)  / (PGDP(-4)  + PGDP(-3)  + PGDP(-2)  + PGDP(-1))

items.desc: Public Sector taxes on Income & Wealth
items.eq: PUBSTIW  = TYEM  + TSEOP  + PRT  + TCINV  + CT  + CGT  + FCACA  + BETPRF  + BETLEVY  + OFGEM  - NPISHTC  - TYPCO  + PROV  - LAEPS
items.py: v['TYEM']  + v['TSEOP']  + v['PRT']  + v['TCINV']  + v['CT']  + v['CGT']  + v['FCACA']  + v['BETPRF']  + v['BETLEVY']  + v['OFGEM']  - v['NPISHTC']  - v['TYPCO']  + v['PROV']  - v['LAEPS']

items.desc: Public Sector taxes on Production (& products)
items.eq: PUBSTPD  = (CETAX  - BETPRF)  + EXDUTAC  + XLAVAT  + LAVAT  - EUOT  + TSD  + ROCS  + TXMIS  + RFP  + (NNDRA  + VEDCO  + LAPT  + OPT  + EUETS)  + CIL  + ENVLEVY  + BANKROLL  + RULC
items.py: (v['CETAX']  - v['BETPRF'])  + v['EXDUTAC']  + v['XLAVAT']  + v['LAVAT']  - v['EUOT']  + v['TSD']  + v['ROCS']  + v['TXMIS']  + v['RFP']  + (v['NNDRA']  + v['VEDCO']  + v['LAPT']  + v['OPT']  + v['EUETS'])  + v['CIL']  + v['ENVLEVY']  + v['BANKROLL']  + v['RULC']

items.eq: PSCR  = PUBSTIW  + PUBSTPD  + OCT  + CC  + INHT  + EENIC  + EMPNIC  + (RCGIM  + RLAIM  + OSPC)  + PSINTR  + (RNCG  + HHTCG)  + LARENT  + PCRENT  + BLEVY  + LAEPS  + SWISSCAP
items.py: v['PUBSTIW']  + v['PUBSTPD']  + v['OCT']  + v['CC']  + v['INHT']  + v['EENIC']  + v['EMPNIC']  + (v['RCGIM']  + v['RLAIM']  + v['OSPC'])  + v['PSINTR']  + (v['RNCG']  + v['HHTCG'])  + v['LARENT']  + v['PCRENT']  + v['BLEVY']  + v['LAEPS']  + v['SWISSCAP']

items.eq: NATAXES  = PUBSTIW  + PUBSTPD  + OCT  + BLEVY  + INHT  + LAEPS  + SWISSCAP  + EENIC  + EMPNIC  + CC  + EUOT
items.py: v['PUBSTIW']  + v['PUBSTPD']  + v['OCT']  + v['BLEVY']  + v['INHT']  + v['LAEPS']  + v['SWISSCAP']  + v['EENIC']  + v['EMPNIC']  + v['CC']  + v['EUOT']

items.eq: PSGI  = CGIPS  + LAIPS  + IPCPS  + IBPC  + DINVCG  + (NPACG  + NPALA)  + (KCGPSO  - KPSCG)  + (KLA  - KGLAPC  - KGLA)  + (KPCPS  - KPSPC)  + ASSETSA
items.py: v['CGIPS']  + v['LAIPS']  + v['IPCPS']  + v['IBPC']  + v['DINVCG']  + (v['NPACG']  + v['NPALA'])  + (v['KCGPSO']  - v['KPSCG'])  + (v['KLA']  - v['KGLAPC']  - v['KGLA'])  + (v['KPCPS']  - v['KPSPC'])  + v['ASSETSA']

items.eq: CGNB  = (CGWS  + CGP)  + CGTSUB  + CGSB  + CGNCGA  + CGCGLA  + CGOTR  + GNP4  + EUVAT  + DICGOP  + (CGIPS  + NPACG)  + DINVCG  + (KCGLA  + KCGPC)  + KCGPSO  - KPSCG  - (PUBSTIW  + TYPCO)  - (PUBSTPD  - LAPT)  - (OCT  + LANNDR)  - (INHT  + LAEPS  + SWISSCAP)  - (EMPNIC  + EENIC)  - CGNDIV  - CGINTRA  - (RNCG  + HHTCG  + BLEVY)
items.py: (v['CGWS']  + v['CGP'])  + v['CGTSUB']  + v['CGSB']  + v['CGNCGA']  + v['CGCGLA']  + v['CGOTR']  + v['GNP4']  + v['EUVAT']  + v['DICGOP']  + (v['CGIPS']  + v['NPACG'])  + v['DINVCG']  + (v['KCGLA']  + v['KCGPC'])  + v['KCGPSO']  - v['KPSCG']  - (v['PUBSTIW']  + v['TYPCO'])  - (v['PUBSTPD']  - v['LAPT'])  - (v['OCT']  + v['LANNDR'])  - (v['INHT']  + v['LAEPS']  + v['SWISSCAP'])  - (v['EMPNIC']  + v['EENIC'])  - v['CGNDIV']  - v['CGINTRA']  - (v['RNCG']  + v['HHTCG']  + v['BLEVY'])

items.eq: LANB  = (LAWS  + LAPR)  + LATSUB  + LASBHH  + LANCGA  - CGCGLA  + LAOTRHH  + DILAPR  + (LAIPS  + NPALA)  - KCGLA  + (KLA  - KGLAPC)  - KGLA  - LAPT  - (CC  - LANNDR)  - LAINTRA  - LANDIV  - LARENT  - CIL
items.py: (v['LAWS']  + v['LAPR'])  + v['LATSUB']  + v['LASBHH']  + v['LANCGA']  - v['CGCGLA']  + v['LAOTRHH']  + v['DILAPR']  + (v['LAIPS']  + v['NPALA'])  - v['KCGLA']  + (v['KLA']  - v['KGLAPC'])  - v['KGLA']  - v['LAPT']  - (v['CC']  - v['LANNDR'])  - v['LAINTRA']  - v['LANDIV']  - v['LARENT']  - v['CIL']

items.eq: PCNB  = DIPCOP  + IPCPS  + IBPC  - (KCGPC  + KGLAPC)  + (KPCPS  - KPSPC)  + TYPCO  - OSPC  - PCNDIV  - PCINTRA  - PCRENT
items.py: v['DIPCOP']  + v['IPCPS']  + v['IBPC']  - (v['KCGPC']  + v['KGLAPC'])  + (v['KPCPS']  - v['KPSPC'])  + v['TYPCO']  - v['OSPC']  - v['PCNDIV']  - v['PCINTRA']  - v['PCRENT']

items.desc: Public Sector Net Borrowing (Eviews add factor)
CG loans & sales of financial assets
Public Sector loans & sales of financial assets

items.eq: CGACADJ  = (EXDUTAC  + NICAC  + INCTAC)  + FCACA  + CGACRES  + (ILGAC  + CONACC)  + MFTRAN
items.py: (v['EXDUTAC']  + v['NICAC']  + v['INCTAC'])  + v['FCACA']  + v['CGACRES']  + (v['ILGAC']  + v['CONACC'])  + v['MFTRAN']

items.eq: PSACADJ  = CGACADJ  + LAAC  + LAMFT  + PCAC  + PCGILT  + MFTPC
items.py: v['CGACADJ']  + v['LAAC']  + v['LAMFT']  + v['PCAC']  + v['PCGILT']  + v['MFTPC']

items.desc: Stock of CG gilts excluding linkers

items.eq: PSTA  = PSTA(-1)  * PIF  / PIF(-1)  + 0.5  * (PSNI  + KCGPC  + KGLAPC  - KLA  - KCGPSO)  * (1  + GGIDEF  / GGIDEF(-1))
items.py: _lag('PSTA', 1)  * v['PIF']  / _lag('PIF', 1)  + 0.5  * (v['PSNI']  + v['KCGPC']  + v['KGLAPC']  - v['KLA']  - v['KCGPSO'])  * (1  + v['GGIDEF']  / _lag('GGIDEF', 1))

items.desc: CG net lending to private sector
Net lending by CG to PCs
Net lending by CG to LAs
LA net lending to private sector & RoW
LA market borrowing net CG/PC debt
items.eq: LABRO  = LANB  + LALEND  + LAMISE  + LAAC  + LAGILT  + LAMFT  - LCGLA
items.py: v['LANB']  + v['LALEND']  + v['LAMISE']  + v['LAAC']  + v['LAGILT']  + v['LAMFT']  - v['LCGLA']

items.eq: CGNCR  = CGNB  + CGLSFA  + CGACADJ  + LCGLA  + LCGPC

items.desc: Imputed GG debt from finance leases
Imputed PC debt from finance leases

items.eq: d(PSND)  = PSNCR  - ILGAC  + d(FLEASGG)  + d(FLEASPC)  + PSNDRES
d(GGGD)  = CGNCR  + LABRO  - ILGAC  + d(SRES)  + d(GGLIQ)  + GGGDRES

items.desc: Bank deposit rate: sight & time deposits
Effective Rate on Bank lending to PNFCs
Notes & coins in circulation outside BoE
Wages & salaries inc. benefits in kind
items.eq: WFP  = ADJW  * PSAVEI  * (EMS  - ESLFS)  + (52  / 4000)  * CGWADJ  * ERCG  * ECG  + (52  / 4000)  * LAWADJ  * ERLA  * ELA
items.py: v['ADJW']  * v['PSAVEI']  * (v['EMS']  - v['ESLFS'])  + (52  / 4000)  * v['CGWADJ']  * v['ERCG']  * v['ECG']  + (52  / 4000)  * v['LAWADJ']  * v['ERLA']  * v['ELA']

items.desc: Employers' imputed social contributions to funded pensions

items.eq: OSB  / OSB(-1)  = PCE  / PCE(-1)  * GAD3  / GAD3(-1)
SBHH  = EMPISC  + OSB  + (HHSB  - HHISC  - EMPISCPP)  + CGSB  + LASBHH  + EESCLA  + EESCCG  + CGASC  - BENAB@ADD(V) SBHH  SBHH_A

items.desc: Household current taxes on income & wealth
items.eq: TYWHH  = TYEM  + TSEOP  + CC  + CGT  + OCT  - NPISHTC@ADD(V) TYWHH  TYWHH_A

items.desc: Household current taxes on income & wealth (Eviews add factor)
Net misc. transfer receipts of HH (&NPISH)
Total interest payments of HH (&NPISH) ex. FISIM
Total interest payments of HH (&NPISH): mortgage FISIM
Total interest payments of HH (&NPISH): unsecured mortgage FISIM
FISIM adjsutment in HH disposable income
Total interest receipts of HH (&NPISH) ex. FISIM
Total interest receipts of HH (&NPISH): FISIM
Total interest receipts of PNFCs ex. FISIM
Total interest receipts of PNFCs: FISIM
Total interest payments of PNFCs ex. FISIM
Total interest payments of PNFCs: FISIM
Employees' contributions to funded pension schemes

items.eq: EESC  = EESCLA  + EENIC  + EECPP  + EESCCG@ADD(V) EESC  EESC_A
HHDI  = MI  + FYEMP  - EMPSC  - EESC  - TYWHH  + NMTRHH  + SBHH  + (PIRHH  - PIPHH  + FSMADJ)  - HHSB  + HHISC  + (EECOMPC  - EECOMPD)  + OSHH
items.py: v['MI']  + v['FYEMP']  - v['EMPSC']  - v['EESC']  - v['TYWHH']  + v['NMTRHH']  + v['SBHH']  + (v['PIRHH']  - v['PIPHH']  + v['FSMADJ'])  - v['HHSB']  + v['HHISC']  + (v['EECOMPC']  - v['EECOMPD'])  + v['OSHH']

items.desc: Employers' contributions to funded pension schemes
Adj. for change in net equity of HH pension funds

items.eq: NAFHH  = SVHH  + KGHH  - DINVHH  - VALHH  - NPAHH  - IHHPS
items.py: v['SVHH']  + v['KGHH']  - v['DINVHH']  - v['VALHH']  - v['NPAHH']  - v['IHHPS']

items.eq: NAFCO  =  - NAFHH  + CB  + EUKT  - CGKTA  - OPSKTA  + NPAA  + SDEPS  - SDI  + PSNBCY
items.py: - v['NAFHH']  + v['CB']  + v['EUKT']  - v['CGKTA']  - v['OPSKTA']  + v['NPAA']  + v['SDEPS']  - v['SDI']  + v['PSNBCY']

items.eq: SAVCO  = NAFCO  + KGHH  - DINVHH  + DINVPS  - DINVCG  + VALPS  - VALHH  - NPAHH  + IFPS  - IHHPS  - NPACG  - CGIPS  - KLA  - KCGPSO  - LAIPS  - NPALA  + INHT  + KGLA  - EUKT  + CGKTA  + OPSKTA  - NPAA  - IPCPS  - IBPC
items.py: v['NAFCO']  + v['KGHH']  - v['DINVHH']  + v['DINVPS']  - v['DINVCG']  + v['VALPS']  - v['VALHH']  - v['NPAHH']  + v['IFPS']  - v['IHHPS']  - v['NPACG']  - v['CGIPS']  - v['KLA']  - v['KCGPSO']  - v['LAIPS']  - v['NPALA']  + v['INHT']  + v['KGLA']  - v['EUKT']  + v['CGKTA']  + v['OPSKTA']  - v['NPAA']  - v['IPCPS']  - v['IBPC']

items.desc: Total Final Expenditure at current prices
items.eq: TFEPS  = CGGPS  + CONSPS  + DINVPS  + VALPS  + IFPS  + XPS
items.py: v['CGGPS']  + v['CONSPS']  + v['DINVPS']  + v['VALPS']  + v['IFPS']  + v['XPS']

items.desc: Gross Domestic Product at market prices
Gross Domestic Product at market prices NSA
Gross Domestic Product at market prices NSA (Eviews add factor)
Basic Price Adjustment at current prices
items.eq: BPAPS  = (CETAX  - BETPRF)  + EXDUTAC  + XLAVAT  + LAVAT  + TSD  + TXMIS  + ROCS  - (EUSUBP  + LASUBP  + CGSUBP  + CCLACA)  + BANKROLL  + BLEVY
items.py: (v['CETAX']  - v['BETPRF'])  + v['EXDUTAC']  + v['XLAVAT']  + v['LAVAT']  + v['TSD']  + v['TXMIS']  + v['ROCS']  - (v['EUSUBP']  + v['LASUBP']  + v['CGSUBP']  + v['CCLACA'])  + v['BANKROLL']  + v['BLEVY']

items.desc: Gross Value Added at basic prices
Total Final Expenditure at constant prices
items.eq: TFE  = CGG  + CONS  + DINV  + VAL  + IF  + X
items.py: v['CGG']  + v['CONS']  + v['DINV']  + v['VAL']  + v['IF']  + v['X']

items.desc: Gross Domestic Product at market prices, CVM
Gross Value Added at basic prices, CVM

items.eq: TPRODPS  = NNDRA  + NIS  + VEDCO  + OPT  + LAPT  + EUETS  - CGSUBPR  - LASUBPR  - EUSUBPR
items.py: v['NNDRA']  + v['NIS']  + v['VEDCO']  + v['OPT']  + v['LAPT']  + v['EUETS']  - v['CGSUBPR']  - v['LASUBPR']  - v['EUSUBPR']

items.eq: OS  = GDPMPS  - FYEMP  - MI  - BPAPS  - TPRODPS  - SDI
items.py: v['GDPMPS']  - v['FYEMP']  - v['MI']  - v['BPAPS']  - v['TPRODPS']  - v['SDI']

items.desc: FISIM generated from Rest of World

items.eq: FISIMPS  = (DIRHHf  + DIPHHuf  + DIPHHmf)  + (DIRICf  + DIPICf)  + FISIMGG  + FISIMROW

items.desc: Gross trading profits of all private companies
items.eq: FYCPR  = OS  - OSHH  - OSGG  - OSPC  - RENTCO  + SA  - FISIMPS
items.py: v['OS']  - v['OSHH']  - v['OSGG']  - v['OSPC']  - v['RENTCO']  + v['SA']  - v['FISIMPS']

items.desc: Gross National Income at market prices
items.eq: GNIPS  = GDPMPS  + NIPD  + (EECOMPC  - EECOMPD)  + (EUSUBPR  + EUSUBP)  - (EUOT  + EUVAT)

items.eq: NAEQAROW  = ( 0.25  * (EQAROW(-1)  + EQAROW(-2)  + EQAROW(-3)  + EQAROW(-4))  / (0.25  * (EQAROW(-1)  + EQAROW(-2)  + EQAROW(-3)  + EQAROW(-4))  + 0.25  * (BAROW(-1)  + BAROW(-2)  + BAROW(-3)  + BAROW(-4))))  * (AAROW  - d(DAROW)  - NAOTAROW)
